name: Goldman Sachs
ai_strategy_summary: Platform-agnostic multi-model AI deployed to 46,000 employees. Goldman's GS AI Assistant runs on OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic models simultaneously, with CEO targeting 100% firm adoption by end of 2026. Expanding into autonomous agents for compliance and onboarding.
headline_initiative: GS AI Assistant — multi-model firmwide platform

advisor_productivity.headline: GS AI Assistant deployed to 46,000 employees, targeting 100% by end of 2026
advisor_productivity.detail: Goldman Sachs built a model-agnostic AI assistant running on GPT-4o, Gemini, Claude 3.7 Sonnet, and open-source models. Over 50% of 46,000 employees are active users as of early 2026. The multi-model approach gives Goldman flexibility to use the best model for each task and reduces vendor lock-in.
evidence: Supports: OpenAI GPT-4o/o3-mini, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude 3.7 Sonnet
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Goldman's model-agnostic strategy is architecturally sophisticated. JPM's AI strategy should consider similar flexibility rather than single-vendor lock-in.

operations_compliance.headline: 6-month Anthropic partnership for autonomous agents in accounting, KYC, and onboarding
operations_compliance.detail: Goldman Sachs announced a 6-month partnership with Anthropic to develop autonomous AI agents for accounting automation, client KYC processes, and onboarding. This represents a shift from AI-assisted workflows to AI-executed workflows in compliance-sensitive areas.
evidence: Focus areas: accounting automation, client vetting, onboarding
operations_compliance.jpm_implication: Autonomous compliance agents at Goldman will pressure all banks to automate KYC/onboarding or face cost disadvantage. JPM should monitor this pilot closely.

research_content.headline: AI-powered research summarization and market intelligence across platform
research_content.detail: The GS AI Assistant includes research summarization, market commentary generation, and multilingual content capabilities built into the firmwide platform.
evidence: Integrated into GS AI Assistant platform
research_content.jpm_implication: Goldman's research AI gives advisors faster access to insights. JPM research distribution speed is a competitive differentiator.
